name: project-intelligence
description: Project-level intelligence for specs, plans, standards, knowledge, graph context, systematic debugging, quality checks, lifecycle maintenance, and reuse guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Project specs, standards, knowledge, graph context, debugging, lifecycle maintenance, and review checks.
interface.longDescription: Project Intelligence initializes and refreshes a repository-local .project-intel knowledge base for project specs, implementation plans, standards, reusable frontend/backend patterns, optional GitNexus and Understand-Anything graph context, systematic debugging, quality checks, code review workflows, and post-task maintenance. Init checks optional graph tools, runs installed analysis commands automatically, and asks before installing missing supported tools. It intentionally does not integrate with cgraphx.
defaultPrompt: Initialize project standards and knowledge with tooling checks.
Brainstorm this requirement and write a project spec.
Write an implementation plan from this spec.
Investigate this bug with project context.
Review this change with project intelligence.
Maintain project knowledge after this task.
